headline: Supreme Court Ruling Puts Eli Lilly Medicaid Risks And Dividend In Focus
summary: U.S. Supreme Court declined to hear Eli Lilly's appeal in a major whistleblower case tied to Medicaid rebates. The decision leaves in place a significant judgment related to allegations the company underpaid rebates to the government program. The ruling highlights legal and compliance risks around how pharmaceutical companies interact with U.S. government healthcare programs. Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) faces this legal setback with its stock at $1,004.92, after a gain of 3.9% over the past week...

headline: Three Biotechs That Are Top Takeover Targets
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) is the stock everyone wants to talk about, and the reasons are obvious: Mounjaro revenue jumped 125% to $8.66 billion last quarter, the company raised full-year revenue guidance to $82 to $85 billion, and the market cap now sits at roughly $881.8 billion. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The ... Three Biotechs That Are Top Takeover Targets

headline: Lilly to participate in Bernstein's 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) will participate in Bernstein's 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28, 2026. Daniel M. Skovronsky, M.D., Ph.D., chief scientific and product officer, and president of Lilly Research Laboratories, will take part in a fireside chat at 1:30 p.m., Eastern time.

headline: Recludix Pharma to Present at RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference
summary: SAN DIEGO, May 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Recludix Pharma, a clinical-stage company leading the discovery and development of inhibitors of challenging targets for inflammatory disease, today announced that Nancy Whiting, Pharm.D., chief executive officer of Recludix, will present an overview of the company at the RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference in New York, NY.
